cards.title: Ingest & Decouple
cards.thought: Buffer incoming hot state updates using an ephemeral event bus.

Parse raw markdown
Resolve sequence IDs

cards.title: Privacy Guardrail
cards.thought: Intercept PII and secrets before writing to storage layers.
cards.body:
Regex & NER scrubbing
Token redactor
Hash system secrets

cards.title: Vector Embedding
cards.thought: Generate semantic vectors to calculate state drift over time.
cards.body:
Chunk long forms
Generate embeddings
Compute cosine similarity

cards.title: Graph Stitching
cards.thought: Link dynamic agent memories to the central knowledge graph topology.
cards.body:
Extract entities
Map dependencies
Update entity relations

cards.title: Consensus Lock
cards.thought: Prevent race conditions when multiple agent clusters write to the same memory space.
cards.body:
Raft protocol tick
Resolve delta drift
Commit state update

decision.title: State Validated?
decision.body:
Zero PII detected
Schema matched
Merge conflict clear

loop_label: Loop until vector drift under 2%, graph cyclic validation passes, and WAL is flushed to disk
retry_label: State drift out of bounds / Raft consensus timeout
